description:
The quiz assesses advanced JavaScript error‑handling knowledge, focusing on nuanced pitfalls like serialization issues and cross‑context instanceof failures, presented in a multiple‑choice format without requiring login. It is positioned at a challenging, senior‑level difficulty and maintains an engaging, slightly irreverent teaching tone that encourages deeper mastery.
Topics: JavaScript error handling, Serialization pitfalls, Cross‑context instanceof behavior, Advanced debugging techniques
Audience: Experienced JavaScript developers seeking to sharpen their error‑handling skills, particularly those preparing for senior or specialist roles.
